name: blvm-miniscript
description: Miniscript descriptor and PSBT analysis (getdescriptorinfo, analyzepsbt)

name: blvm-marketplace
description: Module marketplace for blvm-node: module discovery, registry fetching, and payment processing.

name: blvm-governance
description: Governance module for blvm-node: on-chain proposal voting and community signaling.

name: blvm-fibre
description: FIBRE (Fast Internet Bitcoin Relay Engine) UDP/FEC block relay for blvm-node (loadable module).

name: blvm-zmq
description: ZeroMQ PUB notifications for blvm-node: hashblock, hashtx, rawblock, rawtx, sequence (Bitcoin-compatible).
